description.zh-cn: 银联支付（基于 yansongda/pay v3 的 unipay），支持网关网页(PC)与手机(WAP)支付及异步回调验签后标记订单已支付。需开通银联商户资质并安装 yansongda/pay。
description.en: UnionPay (powered by yansongda/pay v3 unipay): supports web (PC) and WAP gateway payment with signed async callbacks marking the order paid. Requires UnionPay merchant qualification and yansongda/pay.
